title: Jane Rochmes
text:
Faculty directory observation
Name: Jane Rochmes
Snapshot: 2026-07-21
published_titles: Associate Director of the Center for Education Research and Policy
education_entries: Ph D in Public Policy and Sociology, University of Michigan
MA in Sociology, University of Michigan
research_interests: Racial and Socioeconomic Inequality in Education, Teacher Attitudes, Teacher Quality of Life, Education Policy, Social Demography, Research-Practice Partnerships with School Districts
teaching_interests: Sociology of Education, Racial and Ethnic Relations, Multicultural Education
publications: Journal Article, Academic Journal (2024). Educational inequality as a consequence and cause of race . Sociological Forum. Volume, 39. Issue, 3. Pages, 231-249.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2021). Class and the cultural styles applicants present to gatekeepers . Poetics. Volume, 86.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). Stress in Boom Times: Understanding Teachers’ Economic Anxiety in a High Cost Urban District . AERA Open. Volume, 5. Issue, 4. Pages, 1-20.
Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). Writing in Race: Evidence Against Employers’ Assumptions About Race and Soft Skills . Social Problems.
Research Report (2019). Perceptions of Career and Technical Education in VA . Center for Education Research and Policy Report.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). Differing Views of Equity: How prospective educators perceive their role in closing achievement gaps . RSF: The Russell Sage Foundation Journal of the Social Sciences.

Journal Article, Academic Journal (2019). Presenting Their Gendered Selves? How Women and Men Describe Who They Are, What They Have Done, and Why They Want the Job in Their Written Applications . Sex Roles.

Presentations: Linda Waldron, Jane Rochmes, Eastern Sociological Society Annual Meeting, "‘Controversial’ Content in Public Schools: The Intersection of Federal, State and Local Policies in the Shadow of the Capital," Chicago, IL. (2026)
Grants and Sponsored Research: Linda Waldron, Jane Rochmes, Laine Briddell, Jaime Harris, Earl Riggins, "Perceptions of Career and Technical Education," Sponsored by Dominion Energy Charitable Foundation
Linda Waldron, Jane Rochmes, Laine Briddell, Jaime Harris, Earl Riggins, "Perceptions of Career and Technical Education," Sponsored by Newport News Shipyard
Linda Waldron, Jane Rochmes, Laine Briddell, Jaime Harris, Earl Riggins, "Perceptions of Career and Technical Education," Sponsored by Southern Company Gas
